column7: Mode of Implementation & Name of Consultant

column18: On 21 January 2026, a meeting was conducted with the EDCOP, CO-PPD, RO1, and PIMO to finalize the MABINI ADP Feasibility Study Report.
The concerned technical personnel are now working on and addressing the remaining comments.

The survey work for lateral B is still in progress, delayed due to ongoing right-of-way negotiations. Meanwhile, Laterals H and I have completed their surveys and are now in the design phase. Due to the high-elevation terrain in these areas, heNIA RO1 PDS recommends using an elevated flume structure to navigate terrain. The revised design was complied last august 01, 2025 and is under review.

column20: Preparation of the Registry of Audit Findings.
